mapper.select: SELECT * FROM product_image WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_image (product_id, image_url, sort_order, is_main) VALUES (#{productId}, #{imageUrl}, #{sortOrder}, #{isMain})

INSERT INTO product_image (product_id, image_url, sort_order, is_main) VALUES
(#{item.productId}, #{item.imageUrl}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.isMain})
mapper.update: UPDATE product_image SET sort_order = #{sortOrder} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE product_image SET is_main = 0 WHERE product_id = #{productId}
UPDATE product_image SET is_main = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_image WHERE product_id = #{productId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_image WHERE product_id = #{productId} AND image_url = #{imageUrl}
